titleStmt.title: SII 26.751: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 751. (A.R. No. 700 of 1909.) TUṞAIYŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the central shrine in the Chōḷēśvara temple in the same village.

This inscription states that a certain Kurukularāyāṉ of Tuṟaiyūr in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, built a temple at the place and that on the advice of Kāṅgaiyarāyaṉ, the king made some land in the place belonging to the builder of the temple, a tax-free dēvadāna and a tirunāmattukkāṇi of the god. Four or five officials figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravatti ko
ṉeriṉmaikoṇṭān rāja
rājavaḷanāṭṭut tuṟaiyūril tu
ṟaiyūruṭaiyāṉ kurukularāya
ṉ Eḻuntaruḷuvitta
mpalamuṭaiyār koyil tevar
kaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvarakaṇkā
ṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum Idevaṟku
t tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Iv
vūril Ivaṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilattu
t taṉta nilam Oṉṟaraiyile śrī
koyilum tirumuṟṟamum tirumaṭavi
ḷākamum tirttakkuḷamum Uḷḷiṭ
ṭaṉavaiyiṟṟukkuk kāl nilam Iru
pattiraṇṭāvatu mutal niṅkalāka
nikkavum nikki niṉṟa nilamum Ivvū
ril Ivaṉ kāṇiyāṉa nilattile muṉ
ṟarai nilamumāka nālemukkāl nila
m Ivvāṇṭu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟai
yiliyāka Iṭakkaṭavatākap peṟave
ṇum Eṉṟu kāṅkaiyarāyaṉ namakku
c coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakka
ṭavatākac coṉṉom Innilam
Irupattiraṇṭāvatu mutal Ippaṭi ni
ṅkalum tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyumāka
k kaikkoṇṭu Aṉubhavikka Eḻuti
ṉāṉ tirumantiraolai miṉavaṉ muventa
veḷāṉ Ivai cetirāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ku
rukularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai viḻuppātarāya
ṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Ilaṅkecuraṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 26.751 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
